analyst_note: Q1 2026 BASELINE — Initial population. This is the first active measurement quarter. Chainalysis RFI pending (crypto flows mapped to ecosystem nodes). TRM Labs RFI TBD. A-2 and A-2b not populated — L2 logs not operational. A-1 and A-3 require analyst input from existing research. B-2 strife indicators require analyst input. C-theme partially populatable from early 2026 reporting. All estimates to be replaced with confirmed figures as sources become available.
